title: CoPaw Skill SKILL.md Frontmatter Schema
description: Frontmatter schema for a valid CoPaw skill SKILL.md. Based on the universal skill standard (name + description required), with CoPaw platform extensions (triggers, metadata).

description.description: Concise description of what the skill does and when to use it

triggers.description: [CoPaw extension] Keywords or phrases that should trigger this skill

metadata.description: [CoPaw extension] Platform metadata including version and emoji
